title: Vulksmp
description: Official and maintained modpack for the Vulk smp community.
body:
🌍 Vulk Earth SMP — Build, Conquer, Connect.

What It Is:
Vulk Earth SMP is a Minecraft survival experience set on a 1:1000 scale map of Earth.
Build cities, form nations, or live freely — the choice is yours.

Why It Exists:
We built United Earth SMP to give players freedom without gimmicks.
It’s creativity, collaboration, and strategy — no pay-to-win, no unnecessary mods.

Core Features:
🌎 Earth Map — True-to-scale recreation of our world.
🗣️ Discord Integration — Minecraft & Discord chat synced.
⚒️ Skills System — Level up to unlock new abilities.
🎙️ In-Game Voice Chat — Talk directly in-game.
🧱 Crafting Tweaks — Quality-of-life improvements.
🚀 Optimized Performance — Smooth, lag-free gameplay.

Our Community:
We value creativity, respect, and fair play.
Whether building cities or exploring, you’ll find like-minded players here.
